stemHtml: A vintage single-engine aeroplane with a left-hand rotating propeller (ANTI-CLOCKWISE from the pilot's perspective) performs a go-around, applying full thrust and a large pitch up. Which of the following effects would occur?

options.a: Gyroscopic precession causing a yaw to the right.
options.b: Asymmetric blade effect causing a yaw to the right.
options.c: Slipstream effect causing a yaw to the left.
options.d: Torque effect causing a yaw to the right.
